impact: The previous guide contradicted the committed tests by describing a dict-returning API, wrong action classes, and overbroad private-key rejection that treated the fixture redaction token as invalid. This repair narrows the next retry to one plain Python module, preserves the import sentinel, requires a list-of-errors API, maps the existing fixture action classifications deterministically, and adds syntax-first guardrails so the worker can resume without repeating the same validation failures.
summary: Replace the supervisor repair guide with precise retry instructions for the blocked missing-information output validator.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-63: Add the missing-information output validator as a single no-dataclass Python module after the import test and four-item fixture pass, proving source backing, deduplication, action classification, and private-value rejection using only `ppd/tests/fixtures/missing_information_output/four_requested_items.json`.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
